hero_subtitle: SFTY helps banks prepare audit-ready compliance evidence by connecting provider outputs into a unified workflow for due diligence, risk visibility, and case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Bank due diligence suffers from incomplete evidence
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to assemble consistent audit packages when data and decisions remain distributed across disconnected systems. This creates delays and gaps that complicate risk reviews and reduce confidence during banking due diligence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes compliance data, audit evidence, case history and decision logs into a single workflow so banks can confidently prepare comprehensive materials for due diligence and risk review.
workflow_title: From provider checks to bank due diligence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes compliance provider outputs through rules, case workflows, evidence preservation and reporting to support comprehensive bank due diligence preparation.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. The compliance control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides bank executives with a unified compliance layer that links provider outputs into auditable workflows, decisions, evidence, and clear risk visibility for due diligence.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides banks a controlled compliance layer that connects provider outputs with audit-ready evidence and governance for secure, transparent due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for bank compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects compliance data from providers into one operational layer, improving risk visibility, decision consistency, audit trail strength and regulatory readiness for bank compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY aid bank due diligence workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures due diligence by linking customer profiles, wallet activity, alerts, cases and reports into clear workflows, helping banks prepare consistent compliance materials efficiently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence within its platform to provide audit-ready records for due diligence and regulatory review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and screening tools to connect outputs into structured workflows without replacing current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace bank onboarding providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace onboarding or risk providers but connects their outputs to create a controlled, traceable compliance workflow for banks.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready evidence for banking due diligence
final_description: Review how SFTY connects compliance data, cases and decision logs to support bank risk control and audit readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
